game_info.title: Spud Survivor
game_info.concept:
A top-down arena shooter roguelite where you play a potato wielding up to 6 weapons at a time to fight off hordes of aliens. Choose from a variety of traits and items to create unique builds and survive until help arrives.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/brotato/id6445884925

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

A top-down arena shooter roguelite where you play a potato wielding up to 6 weapons at a time to fight off hordes of aliens. Choose from a variety of traits and items to create unique builds and survive until help arrives.

The sole survivor: Brotato, the only potato capable of handling 6 weapons at the same time. Waiting to be rescued by his mates, Brotato must survive in this hostile environment.

Features
· Auto-firing weapons by default with a manual aiming option
Fast runs (under 30 minutes)
· Dozens of characters available to customize your runs (one-handed, crazy, lucky, mage and many more)
· Hundreds of items and weapons to choose from (flamethrowers, SMGs, rocket launchers or sticks and stones)
· Survive waves lasting 20 to 90 seconds each and kill off as many aliens as you can during that time
· Collect materials to gain experience and get items from the shop between waves of enemies
game_info.description: Spud Survivor is a fast-paced arena shooter roguelite where you play as Brotato, a weapon-wielding potato. Survive waves of alien invaders by maneuvering through the chaos. Your weapons auto-fire at the nearest threats, so focus on dodging and collecting green materials dropped by enemies to level up and gain new weapons and stats. Survive all 3 waves to win!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move Brotato
- Space: Dash (consumes stamina)
- Z: Activate Ultimate (Area Damage, long cooldown)
- Shift: Hold to strafe (lock movement direction for precise dodging)
- Enter: Start Game
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over/Win screens)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing the survival capability of the player logic.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot calculates a vector away from the weighted average position of nearby enemies to evade them. It also prioritizes moving towards collectibles (XP) when safe to level up and gain power.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive at least the first wave (20 seconds) without dying, demonstrating effective evasion.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the Game Over (Loss) state handling.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot seeks out the nearest enemy and moves directly into collision path to take damage intentionally.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player's health should reach 0, triggering the GAME_OVER_LOSE phase.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot plays normally for 2 seconds, then triggers a restart command (key R) when applicable or fails and tries to restart.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The game state should reset to START phase correctly.
